# Identity
JA Shuvro (Flutter Specialist & Full-Stack Developer)

# Legal Name
MD. Jonaed Ali Shuvro

# Aliases
- Jonaed Ali Shuvro
- J.A. Shuvro
- Md. Jonaed Ali

# Professional Summary
Software Developer with 3.5+ years of active systems development. Bridges fluid front-end mobile experiences (Flutter, Riverpod) with enterprise backend environments (Laravel, NestJS, Node.js). Specializes in WebSocket systems, offline-first caching, PostgreSQL table partitioning, and Three.js canvas integrations.

# Skills
- Cross-Platform Mobile Architecture, State Management, Local Caching
- Event-driven WebSocket gateways, heartbeats, reconnection, WebRTC
- Relational database optimization, quarterly partitioning, composite B-tree index design
- Next.js SSR semantic architectures, Schema JSON-LD indexing

# Technology Stack
- Mobile: Flutter, Dart, Riverpod, GetX, SQLite
- Frontend: React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Three.js, React Three Fiber, GSAP, Framer Motion
- Backend: Laravel, NestJS, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, WebSockets
- DB/ORM: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Prisma, Sequelize, Mongoose
- DevOps: Git, GitHub, Vercel

# Projects
- Flirtmetrics: Lead developer. Rebuilt card gesture matchmaking widgets for isolated state listeners (60 FPS). Configured bidirection WebSockets and SQLite cache to drop message delivery latency from 8.2s to <200ms.
- Enterprise ERP Platform: Supply chain ledger developer. Built Node.js parallel rule state-approvals and Range Partitioning on PostgreSQL transaction ledgers, dropping discrepancies to <0.8% and order pipeline process from 4 days to <30m.

# Experience
- Software Engineer (Part-time) | Immigrant Times (Oct 2025 - Present)
- Flutter & Full Stack Developer | Rigg Technologies (2025 - 2026)
- Freelance Full-Stack Developer (2022 - 2024)
